title: acokanthera oblongifolia
intro: Acokanthera oblongifolia, also known as the poison arrow plant or khatikati, is a toxic plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant's roots and leaves contain bufadienolides, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to their medicinal properties. The health benefits of Acokanthera oblongifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, but caution is advised due to its toxic compounds, and it should only be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
